name: serenity
description: Static home snapshot; dev tools for layout tests

scripts.build:cases: node scripts/sync-case-images.mjs && node scripts/build-cases-all-data.mjs && node scripts/sync-analytics-into-case-all.mjs && node scripts/build-case-all-pages.mjs && node scripts/build-case-mobile-media.mjs && node scripts/build-serenity-legacy-redirects.cjs
scripts.build:blog-prereq: node scripts/build-blog-data.mjs && node scripts/sync-blog-images.mjs && node scripts/gen-blog-articles-manifest.mjs && node scripts/gen-blog-post-pages-manifest.mjs && node scripts/build-blog-mobile-media.mjs && node scripts/sync-blog-article-content.mjs
scripts.build:blog: npm run build:blog-prereq && node scripts/build-blog-article-pages.mjs && npm run build:yandex-news-feed
scripts.build:html: npm run build:cases && npm run build:blog-prereq && node scripts/assemble-html.cjs build && node scripts/build-blog-pages.mjs && node scripts/build-blog-article-pages.mjs && npm run build:sitemap && npm run build:yandex-news-feed && node scripts/typography-nbsp.cjs
scripts.build:service-partials: npm run build:service-inline-lead && npm run build:service-faq && npm run build:service-synergy && npm run build:service-awards && npm run build:service-more-cases
scripts.test:blog: node scripts/verify-blog.cjs && node scripts/verify-blog-article-mp4-range.cjs && node scripts/verify-blog-article-img-paths.cjs
scripts.test:routing-config: node scripts/verify-routing-config.cjs && node scripts/verify-nginx-edge-intercepts.cjs && node scripts/verify-sitemap-lastmod.mjs && node scripts/verify-sitemap-loc-policy.mjs && node scripts/verify-deploy-surfaces.cjs && node scripts/verify-service-page-urls.cjs
scripts.seo:kontekstnaya-serp-gap:interactive: SERP_INTERACTIVE=1 SERP_LIVE_ONLY=1 SERP_FORCE_REFETCH=1 node scripts/seo/fetch-regional-serp.mjs && node scripts/seo/audit-kontekstnaya-serp-landings.mjs && node scripts/seo/build-kontekstnaya-serp-gap-report.mjs
scripts.seo:targeting-serp-gap: SERP_CAMPAIGN=targeting node scripts/seo/fetch-regional-serp.mjs && SERP_CAMPAIGN=targeting node scripts/seo/audit-kontekstnaya-serp-landings.mjs && SERP_CAMPAIGN=targeting node scripts/seo/build-kontekstnaya-serp-gap-report.mjs
scripts.seo:targeting-serp-gap:interactive: SERP_CAMPAIGN=targeting SERP_INTERACTIVE=1 SERP_LIVE_ONLY=1 SERP_FORCE_REFETCH=1 node scripts/seo/fetch-regional-serp.mjs && SERP_CAMPAIGN=targeting node scripts/seo/audit-kontekstnaya-serp-landings.mjs && SERP_CAMPAIGN=targeting node scripts/seo/build-kontekstnaya-serp-gap-report.mjs
scripts.refresh:kontekstnaya-from-prod: node scripts/capture-prod-kontekst-full-html.cjs && node scripts/download-nuxt-css-prod-kontekstnaya.cjs && npm run assemble:service:kontekstnaya && npm run test:kontekstnaya-reklama
scripts.refresh:targeting-from-prod: node scripts/capture-prod-targeting-full-html.cjs && node scripts/extract-targeting-phase2-slices.cjs && node scripts/extract-targeting-more-cases-partial.cjs && node scripts/build-faq-targeting-static.cjs && node scripts/download-nuxt-css-prod-targeting.cjs && npm run build:service-awards && TARGETING_INCLUDE_PHASE2=1 npm run assemble:service:targeting && node scripts/sync-targeting-sa-images.cjs && TARGETING_VERIFY_PHASE2=1 npm run test:targeting
scripts.test:layout-smoke: npm run test:html-assemble && npm run test:analytics-bundle && npm run test:social-links-contract && npm run test:clients && npm run test:home-cases && npm run test:case-all && npm run test:blog && npm run test:floating-cta && npm run test:nginx-compression && npm run test:snapshot-prefix && npm run test:docs-handbook-local && npm run test:mobile-optimization && npm run test:404-page && npm run test:semantic-core && npm run verify:meta-description && npm run test:sa-img-disk
